en: Now Korah the son of Izhar, son of Kohath, son of Levi, and Dathan and Abiram the sons of Eliab, and On the son of Peleth, sons of Reuben, took men.
zh: 利未的曾孫、哥轄的孫子、以斯哈的兒子可拉，和流本子孫中以利押的兒子大坍、亞比蘭，與比勒的兒子安，帶著人來，

en: And they rose up before Moses, with a number of the people of Israel, 250 chiefs of the congregation, chosen from the assembly, well-known men.
zh: 反抗摩西，還有以色列人中的二百五十個人，就是會眾的領袖；會眾中被選出有名望的人。

en: They assembled themselves together against Moses and against Aaron and said to them, "You have gone too far! For all in the congregation are holy, every one of them, and the LORD is among them. Why then do you exalt yourselves above the assembly of the LORD?"
zh: 他們聚集起來反抗摩西和亞倫，對他們說：“你們太過分了，全體會眾個個都是聖潔的，耶和華也在他們中間，你們為甚麼高抬自己，超過耶和華的會眾呢？”

en: When Moses heard it, he fell on his face,
zh: 摩西聽見了，就臉伏於地，

en: and he said to Korah and all his company, "In the morning the LORD will show who is his, and who is holy, and will bring him near to him. The one whom he chooses he will bring near to him.
zh: 對可拉和他的同黨說：“到了早晨，耶和華就要使人知道誰是屬他的；誰是聖潔的，就叫誰親近他；誰是他揀選的，就叫誰親近他。

en: Do this: take censers, Korah and all his company;
zh: 你們要這樣作：可拉和你的同黨，你們要拿香爐來；

en: put fire in them and put incense on them before the LORD tomorrow, and the man whom the LORD chooses shall be the holy one. You have gone too far, sons of Levi!"
zh: 明天你們要在耶和華面前，把火盛在爐中，把香放在上面；耶和華揀選誰，誰就是聖潔的，你們利未人太過分了。”

en: And Moses said to Korah, "Hear now, you sons of Levi:
zh: 摩西又對可拉說：“利未人哪，請聽。

en: is it too small a thing for you that the God of Israel has separated you from the congregation of Israel, to bring you near to himself, to do service in the tabernacle of the LORD and to stand before the congregation to minister to them,
zh: 以色列的 神把你們從以色列會眾中分別出來，使你們親近他，辦理耶和華帳幕的事務，又站在會眾面前替他們供職；

en: and that he has brought you near him, and all your brothers the sons of Levi with you? And would you seek the priesthood also?
zh: 耶和華又使你和你所有的兄弟，就是利未的子孫，一同親近他，這在你們看來是小事嗎？你們還要尋求祭司職分嗎？

en: Therefore it is against the LORD that you and all your company have gathered together. What is Aaron that you grumble against him?"
zh: 所以你和你的同黨聚集起來反抗耶和華；亞倫算甚麼呢？你們竟向他發怨言。”

en: And Moses sent to call Dathan and Abiram the sons of Eliab, and they said, "We will not come up.
zh: 摩西派人去把以利押的兒子大坍和亞比蘭叫來；他們說：“我們不上去。

en: Is it a small thing that you have brought us up out of a land flowing with milk and honey, to kill us in the wilderness, that you must also make yourself a prince over us?
zh: 你把我們從流奶與蜜的地帶上來，要在曠野殺死我們，這算小事嗎？你還要自立為王管轄我們嗎？

en: Moreover, you have not brought us into a land flowing with milk and honey, nor given us inheritance of fields and vineyards. Will you put out the eyes of these men? We will not come up."
zh: 況且你沒有把我們領到流奶與蜜的地，也沒有把田地和葡萄園給我們作產業。難道你要把這些人的眼睛剜出來嗎？我們不上去。”

en: And Moses was very angry and said to the LORD, "Do not respect their offering. I have not taken one donkey from them, and I have not harmed one of them."
zh: 於是摩西大怒，對耶和華說：“求你不要悅納他們的禮物，我沒有奪過他們一頭驢，也沒有害過他們一個人。”

en: And Moses said to Korah, "Be present, you and all your company, before the LORD, you and they, and Aaron, tomorrow.
zh: 摩西對可拉說：“明天你和你的同黨，以及亞倫，都要站在耶和華面前。

en: And let every one of you take his censer and put incense on it, and every one of you bring before the LORD his censer, 250 censers; you also, and Aaron, each his censer."
zh: 你們各人要拿著自己的香爐，把香盛在上面；你們各人要把自己的香爐帶到耶和華面前，共二百五十個香爐；你和亞倫也各人拿著自己的香爐。”

en: So every man took his censer and put fire in them and laid incense on them and stood at the entrance of the tent of meeting with Moses and Aaron.
zh: 於是，他們各人拿著自己的香爐，盛上火，加上香，與摩西和亞倫一同站在會幕門口。

en: Then Korah assembled all the congregation against them at the entrance of the tent of meeting. And the glory of the LORD appeared to all the congregation.
zh: 可拉召聚了全體會眾到會幕門口，來攻擊摩西和亞倫，耶和華的榮光就向全體會眾顯現。

en: And the LORD spoke to Moses and to Aaron, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西和亞倫說：

en: "Separate yourselves from among this congregation, that I may consume them in a moment."
zh: “你們要離開這會眾，我好在眨眼間把他們吞滅。”

en: And they fell on their faces and said, "O God, the God of the spirits of all flesh, shall one man sin, and will you be angry with all the congregation?"
zh: 摩西和亞倫就俯伏在地，說：“ 神啊，萬人之靈的 神啊，一人犯罪，你就要向全體會眾發怒嗎？”

en: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Say to the congregation, Get away from the dwelling of Korah, Dathan, and Abiram."
zh: “你要吩咐會眾說：‘你們要離開可拉、大坍、亞比蘭帳幕的四周。’”

en: Then Moses rose and went to Dathan and Abiram, and the elders of Israel followed him.
zh: 於是摩西起來，到大坍和亞比蘭那裡去；以色列的長老也隨著他去了。

en: And he spoke to the congregation, saying, "Depart, please, from the tents of these wicked men, and touch nothing of theirs, lest you be swept away with all their sins."
zh: 摩西告訴會眾：“你們要遠離這些惡人的帳幕，凡是他們的東西，你們都不可摸，免得你們因他們的一切罪惡同遭毀滅。”

en: So they got away from the dwelling of Korah, Dathan, and Abiram. And Dathan and Abiram came out and stood at the door of their tents, together with their wives, their sons, and their little ones.
zh: 於是，眾人離開了可拉、大坍、亞比蘭帳幕的四周；大坍、亞比蘭就帶著妻子、兒女和小孩出來，站在自己的帳幕門口。

en: And Moses said, "Hereby you shall know that the LORD has sent me to do all these works, and that it has not been of my own accord.
zh: 摩西說：“由此你們可以知道，我作這一切事，是耶和華派我作的，並不是出於我自己的心意。

en: If these men die as all men die, or if they are visited by the fate of all mankind, then the LORD has not sent me.
zh: 如果這些人死亡像一般人死亡一樣，或是他們所遭遇的像一般人的遭遇一樣，那麼就不是耶和華派我來的。

en: But if the LORD creates something new, and the ground opens its mouth and swallows them up with all that belongs to them, and they go down alive into Sheol, then you shall know that these men have despised the LORD."
zh: 如果耶和華作一件新事，使地開口，把他們和他們所有的都吞下去，叫他們活活地下到陰間，這樣你們就知道這些人是藐視耶和華了。”

en: And as soon as he had finished speaking all these words, the ground under them split apart.
zh: 摩西說完了這一切話，他們腳下的地就裂開。

en: And the earth opened its mouth and swallowed them up, with their households and all the people who belonged to Korah and all their goods.
zh: 地開了口，把他們和他們的家眷，以及一切屬可拉的人和財物，都吞了下去。

en: So they and all that belonged to them went down alive into Sheol, and the earth closed over them, and they perished from the midst of the assembly.
zh: 這樣，他們和一切屬他們的，都活活地下到陰間，地在他們上面合閉，他們就從會眾中滅亡了。

en: And all Israel who were around them fled at their cry, for they said, "Lest the earth swallow us up!"
zh: 在他們四周的以色列眾人，聽見他們的呼叫，就都逃跑，說：“恐怕地也把我們吞下去。”

en: And fire came out from the LORD and consumed the 250 men offering the incense.
zh: 又有火從耶和華那裡出來，把那獻香的二百五十個人吞滅了。

en: Then the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Tell Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest to take up the censers out of the blaze. Then scatter the fire far and wide, for they have become holy.
zh: “你要吩咐亞倫祭司的兒子以利亞撒，叫他把那些香爐從火中拾起來，把火撒在別處，因為那些香爐是聖的；

en: As for the censers of these men who have sinned at the cost of their lives, let them be made into hammered plates as a covering for the altar, for they offered them before the LORD, and they became holy. Thus they shall be a sign to the people of Israel."
zh: 那些犯罪而自害己命的人的香爐也是聖的，你們要把它們錘成薄片，用來包蓋祭壇；那些香爐本是他們在耶和華面前獻過的，所以已經成為聖的，並且可以給以色列作鑒戒。”

en: So Eleazar the priest took the bronze censers, which those who were burned had offered, and they were hammered out as a covering for the altar,
zh: 於是，以利亞撒祭司把被火焚燒的人獻過的銅香爐拿起來，叫人錘成薄片，用來包蓋祭壇，

en: to be a reminder to the people of Israel, so that no outsider, who is not of the descendants of Aaron, should draw near to burn incense before the LORD, lest he become like Korah and his company- as the LORD said to him through Moses.
zh: 給以色列人作鑒戒，叫不是亞倫子孫的外人，不可近前來，在耶和華面前燒香，免得他像可拉和他的同黨有一樣的遭遇；這是照著耶和華藉摩西吩咐以利亞撒的。

en: But on the next day all the congregation of the people of Israel grumbled against Moses and against Aaron, saying, "You have killed the people of the LORD."
zh: 第二天，以色列全體會眾都向摩西和亞倫發怨言，說：“你們害死了耶和華的子民。”

en: And when the congregation had assembled against Moses and against Aaron, they turned toward the tent of meeting. And behold, the cloud covered it, and the glory of the LORD appeared.
zh: 會眾聚集攻擊摩西和亞倫的時候，他們轉身向會幕觀看，見有雲彩遮蓋會幕，耶和華的榮光顯現出來。

en: And Moses and Aaron came to the front of the tent of meeting,
zh: 摩西和亞倫就來到會幕前面。

en: and the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華吩咐摩西說：

en: "Get away from the midst of this congregation, that I may consume them in a moment." And they fell on their faces.
zh: “你們要離開這會眾，我好在眨眼間把他們消滅。”他們二人就俯伏在地。

en: And Moses said to Aaron, "Take your censer, and put fire on it from off the altar and lay incense on it and carry it quickly to the congregation and make atonement for them, for wrath has gone out from the LORD; the plague has begun."
zh: 摩西對亞倫說：“你要拿著香爐，把壇上的火盛在裡頭，又加上香，快快帶到會眾那裡去，為他們贖罪，因為有震怒從耶和華面前出來，瘟疫已經開始了。”

en: So Aaron took it as Moses said and ran into the midst of the assembly. And behold, the plague had already begun among the people. And he put on the incense and made atonement for the people.
zh: 亞倫照著摩西吩咐的把香爐拿來，跑到會眾中間，果然，瘟疫已經在人民中間開始了；他就加上香，為人民贖罪。

en: And he stood between the dead and the living, and the plague was stopped.
zh: 他站在死人與活人中間，瘟疫就止住了。

en: Now those who died in the plague were 14,700, besides those who died in the affair of Korah.
zh: 除了因可拉事件死亡的以外，因瘟疫死亡的有一萬四千七百人。

en: And Aaron returned to Moses at the entrance of the tent of meeting, when the plague was stopped.
zh: 亞倫回到會幕門口摩西那裡，瘟疫已經止住了。
